read returns null when no value found for key
read returns stored value when has one
clear removes all values for this storage
.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_shared.test.src.utils.iterable_ext
separatedBy adds given separator between each item in the list
separatedBy adds nothing when source has one item
separatedByIndexed inserts correctly separator base on index
separatedByIndexed adds nothing when source is empty
separatedBy adds nothing when source is empty
separatedByIndexed adds nothing when source has one item
.frontend.packages.internal.catalyst_voices_shared.test.src.cache.local_tll_cache
LocalTllCache when key is not expired value is returned
LocalTllCache extend expiration makes key valid for longer
LocalTllCache when key is expired null is returned

Test platform detection PlatformWidgetBuilder fallbacks to other
